prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the visual style and composition reference, transform the pearlescent bead-and-jewel bust from Chang'e into Erlang Shen Yang Jian. Keep the same black background, half-length bust framing, luxury macro photography look, floating pearl/bubble particles, and intricate translucent beadwork. Change the subject into a masculine Chinese mythological warrior deity with a taller jeweled crown, darker blue-and-gold hair ornaments, sharper heroic silhouette, ornate shoulder armor, and richer red, blue, teal, pearl, and gold gemstones. Add exactly 1 prominent dragon-themed jeweled shoulder/armor motif on the viewer's right, made from beads and gems. Replace the left-side title graphic with an ornate circular bead-and-gold emblem containing exactly 4 elements: 1 small golden dragon icon at the top, 1 large main title text 二郎神, 1 smaller subtitle text 楊戩, and 1 thin horizontal divider line between the title and subtitle. Make all lettering look constructed from golden pearls and filigree, matching the jewelry material. Preserve the elegant dark negative space and high-contrast sparkling highlights; do not add modern objects, extra text, or a watermark.
